obligations.rule: Ensure domains with spaces in TLD are rejected when require_tld is true.
obligations.why: The source code explicitly checks for spaces in the TLD when require_tld is true, but this case is not covered in the current suite.

obligations.rule: Ensure numeric TLDs are rejected when allow_numeric_tld is false.
obligations.why: The source code has a specific branch to reject numeric TLDs when allow_numeric_tld is false, but this case is not explicitly tested.

obligations.rule: Ensure domains with parts exceeding 63 characters are rejected when ignore_max_length is false.
obligations.why: The source code enforces a 63-character limit on domain parts unless ignore_max_length is true, but this case is not explicitly tested.
